description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 2 implementation cluster. Pins test-first development apart from docs-first library work and unknown-cause debugging.

cases.prompt: Implement the proration logic for mid-cycle plan changes — write the failing tests first so we agree on the math before code.
cases.reason: Explicit failing-tests-first request with a specifiable contract — the red-green-refactor loop is the deliverable.

cases.prompt: Hook our invoices up to the tax-calculation API using their client library.
cases.reason: The governing risk is version/API drift on an external SDK, not contract design — docs-first leads; tests still verify at the end.

cases.prompt: Proration amounts are wrong for some annual plans since last release and we don't know why. Get to the bottom of it.
cases.reason: Cause unknown — reproduce/reduce/isolate comes first; the reproduction then hands off as the regression test.

cases.prompt: We isolated it: February's leap-day handling in prorateDays() is off by one. Fix it with a regression test that fails first.
cases.reason: Root cause already isolated; the remaining work is exactly the red-green loop with the repro as the failing test.
